algorithms.title: Pediatric Primary Assessment (ABCDE) Sequence
algorithms.description: The hands-on structured exam following the PAT, with immediate treatment of any life threat found.
steps: Airway: assess patency; open/clear/manage immediately if compromised.
Breathing: assess rate, effort, breath sounds, SpO2; assist ventilation immediately if inadequate.
Circulation: assess pulse, skin perfusion, capillary refill, external bleeding; control hemorrhage and support perfusion immediately if compromised.
Disability: rapid neurologic check (e.g., AVPU), pupils, glucose if altered.
Exposure: assess for injury/rash as needed, then re-cover to maintain warmth.
Assign overall priority (high vs. low acuity) based on combined PAT + ABCDE findings.
Proceed to secondary assessment (history-taking, focused exam) if priority allows, or continue rapid transport/intervention if high priority.
